title: aristida dispersa var. coarctata
intro: Aristida dispersa var. coarctata, also known as the 'narrow spike grass', is a plant species belonging to the genus Aristida, characterized by its narrow, compact spikes and slender leaves. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Aristida dispersa var. coarctata include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve coughs, and promote healing, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Aristida dispersa var. coarctata is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its powdered form is used in various herbal preparations to treat respiratory conditions.
